content: I can summarize the core content of this post as: a growth mechanism with diminishing returns? In fact, the growth design of each Awakener is generally not linear and smooth, due to the combined influence of various mechanisms.

A growth mechanism with a higher effect at lower investment but diminishing returns.
So that the floor and ceiling of what you can archive are less extreme, and you don't need an excessive amount of investment to make a talent work at an acceptable level
Plus, the stuff about Keyflare and Aliemus, do try to tell us how the diminish return work for those, considering they are stats that one may spend resources to accumulate
